title: Manufacturing Engineer - Alstom India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Alstom India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
